name: Il Matto (The Fool)
art_description: The Fool marches, blowing on a horn and playing a red drum strapped to his torso. The air around him is filled with red flourishes. He wears a turban with seven fluffy feathers and a red, green, and blue diamond-patterned mask that covers his face and neck. His outfit is covered in patches of various colors and shapes, including diamonds, leaves, crescent moons, hearts, and apples. He also has leafy trim around his shoulders and waist. He wears socks of the same pattern as his mask and blue slipped with curled toes.

name: Il Bagatto (The Magician)
art_description: The Magician wears a costume decorated with red, blue, and green diamonds, a pointy hat with a bell at the tip, and a black mask with a red nose. He stands at a table, surrounded by four small and impish figures dressed all in red with horned masks. They watch three coins and two upside down cups on the table. The Magician holds a striped wand in his right hand and appears to be hiding something in his left hand. Only his left leg is visible under the table. The air around the five figures is filled with swirling red flourishes.

name: La Papessa (The Popess)
art_description: The Female Pope raises two fingers on her right hand (the sign of benediction) and holds two crossed keys in her left (St. Peter's Keys of Heaven, one red and one blue). She wears a three tiered crown with a veil, and a black mask with a red nose. Her dress has a red, yellow, and green diamond pattern and over it she wears a black and white cloak clasped with a red cross in the center of her chest. She is sitting and the toes of her blue shoes peek out from under her costume. Two black and gold discs radiate in the corners of the sky above her.

name: L'Imperatrice (The Empress)
art_description: The Empress wears a crown decorated with alder leaves and catkins and shoes with the same motif. In her right hand she holds a globe with a crescent moon and a seven-pointed star. Her left hand supports a spear that rests across her body. Her costume includes red, black, pink, yellow, blue, and green diamonds and she wears a black mask. She sits and gazes slightly to the left, toward her spear and the red marks rising from its point. There are also winding red marks on the ground, and a black and gold sun in the upper corner behind her.

name: L'Imperatore (The Emperor)
art_description: The Emperor wears a red and black diamond cloaks, a colorful feathered collar, a black mask with white fur trim, and a tall closed crown topped with a black tassel. He sits and holds a small hound dog in his right hand, and props up a spear in his lap with his left hand. He looks slightly to the right, toward a black and gold sun in the upper corner.

name: Il Papa (The Pope)
art_description: The Pope sits and holds a red book in his lap with his left hand. His right hand is on a long staff that rests across his body, topped by a black cross with burning red tips. His hands display stigmata (red wounds). He wears a three-tiered crown with a red veil, red papal slippers decorated with gold crosses, and a brooch with an upside-down cross (the cross of St. Peter). His mask is black with a red nose and his cloak is patterned with red, yellow, and green diamonds. There is a red, black, and gold solar disk in the upper right corner, and he gazes in the opposite direction.

name: L'Amore (Love / The Lovers)
art_description: Two giggling Harlequins meet at an elaborate fountain. One wears a jacket and pants while the other wears a long dress. Both have the same red, black, white, and green pattern and carry red and blue batons decorated with gold leaves. At the top of the fountain, a small winged Harlequin in pink and black posts on one leg, holding a bow and aiming an arrow at the lady-Harlequin.

name: Il Carro (The Chariot)
art_description: A Harlequin with a winged helmet sits atop a high chariot. He holds a globe topped by a cross in his right hand and bares red-bladed sword in his left hand. His mask is black, his costume is decorated with red and green diamonds, and his shoes feature large white bows. The chariot is drawn by two horses pulling in opposite directions, turning their necks around to face each other. The horses wear large feathers on their heads and are criss-crossed by red flourishes. There is a red, black, and gold disk radiating in each upper corner.

name: La Tempra (Temperance)
art_description: Temperance sits and pours red liquid from one pitcher into another. One pitcher is in each hand, and the liquid flows in a long stream across her body. She wears a dress decorated with black and white diamonds, with pink armor on her chest and pink gloves. Her mask is black with a green border and she wears a soft white hat. A cloth with red, blue, green, and yellow diamonds is draped over her lap, and her black shoes are visible beneath her dress, with toes pointing toward each other. There are two red, black, and gold solar discs in the upper corners of the sky.

name: La Giustizia (Justice)
art_description: Justice sits and looks down at a set of scales hanging from a globe held in her left hand. In her right hand she holds a red sword upright. Her dress is patterned with black and white diamonds and has a pale blue bodice. Her mask is black with a green outline and she wears a red bicorne hat, decorated with a gold oval in the center and two baubles hanging from each corner. She has a cloth with red, blue, green, and yellow diamonds draped over her lap. There is a red, black, and gold disk in the upper right corner, and red marks on the ground.

name: La Forza (Fortitude / Strength)
art_description: Fortitude sits with her right arm wrapped around a red-striped column. With her left hand she grips a red baton that rests against her shoulder, with red flourishes rising from the top. She wears a red winged crown and a black mask with a green border. Her dress is patterned with black and white diamonds and she wears red armor on her chest. She has a cloth with red, blue, green, and yellow diamonds draped over her lap. Her dress covers her feet. She gazes to her left, away from the column.

name: La Prudenza (Prudence)
art_description: Prudence gazes into a mirror that she holds in her right hand, engraved with the letter P on the back. In her left hand, she holds a red serpent up next to her head. She wears a white cloth hat and a black mask with a green border. Her dress is patterned with black and white diamonds and has a light green bodice. She has a cloth with red, blue, green, and yellow diamonds draped over her lap, and her black shoes are visible beneath her dress, with toes pointing forward. There are red flourishes on the ground and in the air, and coming out of the serpent's mouth.

name: La Fede (Faith)
art_description: Faith holds a tall gold cross topped with heart-shaped red spikes in her left hand. In her right hand, she holds up a tall golden goblet, above which floats a golden disk marked with the letter A. She wears a black mask with curved horns. Her hat is red, round, and halo-like, and she also wears a black and white striped veil. Her dress is decorated with red and black diamonds. The outside of her cloak has a pattern of black and white diamonds, and the inside is gold and black. Her cloak has a round clasp with a cross on it. White cloth under her dress covers her feet. There are red flourishes in the air, circling the gold disk.

name: La Speranza (Hope)
art_description: Hope is seen in profile, with her legs bent hand her hands joined in prayer as she looks up toward a floating crown on the top right side of the card. She wears a black mask with curved horns and green spirals on the cheeks. Her hat is red, round, and halo-like, and she also wears a black and white striped veil. Her dress is patterned with gold and black diamonds. The outside of her cloak has black and dark red diamonds, while the inside is bright red and green. Her cloak has an oval clasp with a cross on it. She wears pink gloves and socks. There are red flourishes in the air, and the inside of the crown is red.

name: La Carità (Charity)
art_description: Charity looks towards a flaming heart that she holds up in her right hand. She wears a black mask with curved horns. Her hat is red, round, and halo-like, and she also wears a black and white striped veil. The top of her dress is decorated with pale blue and black diamonds, the sleeves with black and white diamonds, and the bottom with black and green diamonds. She wears a gold belt shaped like a serpent biting its own tail. The outside of her cloak has a pattern of pink and black diamonds, and the inside is red, pink, and white. Her cloak has a round clasp with a cross on it. Her left foot emerges from under the dress, and she wears a black and white shoe decorated with a red diamond. There are red flourishes in the air around her. Her seat has a picture of a crane piercing its own breast with its beak.

name: Arlecchino (Male Significator)
art_description: A Harlequin wearing puffed pants and a jacket with puffed sleeves, decorated with rainbow colored diamonds and white trim. He also has a wide-brimmed red hat, pink gloves, a black mask, and black slippers with curled toes. He is looking toward the right side of the card and waving with his left hand. In his right hand, he holds a long baton against his shoulder. The top of the baton is wide and red and decorated with the letter A.

name: Colombina (Female Significator)
art_description: A lady wearing a gown with puffed sleeves and a lacy collar, decorated with rainbow colored diamonds and white trim. The curled black toe of her left slipper peeks out from under her dress. She also wears a wide-brimmed red hat, pink gloves, a black mask. She is looking toward the left side of the card and pointing with her right finger. In her left hand, she holds a long baton against her shoulder. The top of the baton is wide and red and decorated with the letter A.
